name: Standard Legend
short_description: Standard Legend is a standard legend about the standard hero named Rooster who rescues a standard princess, enclosed in a standard fortress, fights with standard rogues, standard undead and standard dragon.
detailed_description:
Standard Legend is a two-dimensional 2D platform game.
Plot: You play as a glorious knight named Rooster, our hero will have to save the princess from the clutches of the dragon. As in any such story, the robbers, evil spirits and the dragon itself, of course, will try to prevent him from being tested on the way to the ladies heart.
about_the_game:
